positive: A stylized, intricate geometric pattern featuring a stylized celestial map and constellation outlines. The design uses a palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant gold leaf accents, and stark white linework. The composition should be radial and contained within a central circular area, forming a mesmerizing, luxurious tapestry suitable for textile printing. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco aesthetics and modern minimalist engraving, utilizing strong, crisp linework, negative space, and dramatic contrasts. Excellent detail, clean lines, high contrast, centered, suitable for direct apparel printing.
